ALL: APPSCRIPT ACQUIRE
nodes.notes:
• Send a POST request to the Apps Script code we created for the Google Sheet document.
• The Apps Script implements a lock function to handle concurrency situations.
• We pass query parameters such as action=acquire and scope=all, with the redirect option enabled.
• The Apps Script is redeployed every time we make changes to the code.

nodes.name: ALL: CHECK SUCCESS IF TRUE
nodes.notes:
• The success field is returned by the Apps Script.
• When two users submit at the same time, one user will receive success: true, while the other will receive success: false. The one with success: false will keep looping until it becomes true.

ALL: FILTER

nodes.name: ALL: CORE LOGIC
nodes.notes:
Get the data from all merged data and the previous node.

* Maximum of 2 bookings per day if the ad type is Silver, Gold, or Platinum.
* No limit if the ad type is Bronze.

parameters.content: ## Output Node - Respond to Webhook & Save
## Output Node - Respond to Webhook & Save
## Output Node - Respond to Webhook & Save
## Output Node - Respond to Webhook & Save

## SocialBooking

**Purpose:**
- The purpose of this automation is to prevent overbooking across different ad types and to ensure that users cannot book the same day for Platinum, Gold, or Silver ads. It also prevents bookings from 8:00 PM PHT onwards.

- Bookings from 8:00 PM to 12:00 AM PHT onwards are not allowed.

- Same day bookings are allowed for the Bronze ad type and Image social post type.

- For Platinum, Gold, or Silver ads, same day bookings are not allowed.

## Documentation
- This automation will run when a webhook received a data from react form.

- The automation will check if the submission time is between 8:00 PM and 12:00 AM PHT. If it is, the submission will not be allowed.

- It will check whether the submission type is single or multiple, then verify the ad type and apply the approriate logic.

- It will send a request to App Script to call the locking concurrency function.

- It will check if the scheduled date is not fully booked 

- The system will then save the booking and release the locking mechanism.

CHECK SUBMITTED AT FIELD V1
